creator: p-fbsd-bugs@ziemba.us
text:
deskutils/thinkingrock and devel/xdg-utils both install identical versions of /usr/local/bin/xdg-{email,open}.

Fix: Attached patch changes deskutils/thinkingrock to stop installing /usr/local/bin/xdg-{email,open} and to add a dependency on devel/xdg-utils.

Patch attached with submission follows:
